title: The Fantastic Four Power Hour
description: Changed by cosmic rays from space, now they save the human race. Sue Storm commands the light, Johnny’s flames burn blazing bright.  Ben is rockin’ the world with might, and Reed bends science left and right!
altHero: The Fantastic Four in their flying car
alt1: The Human Torch flaming a giant gargoyle
alt2: The Invisible Woman blasting a robot guy
